style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

style_a_warm.name: 温暖现实主义（回归变体）
style_a_warm.prompt_suffix: warm morning light, soft golden hour tones, gentle film grain, intimate handheld, hopeful atmosphere

music_sync.lyrics: [钢琴独奏渐弱] 致每一个 在深夜写代码的凡人 / [尾奏 + 字幕]

atmosphere.overall_mood: 回到出租屋——但一切不同了。晨光取代了深夜的冷光，温暖取代了孤独，微笑取代了空洞
atmosphere.lighting: 清晨暖金色阳光透过窗户洒进房间

video_prompt: Return to the small apartment but now in warm morning golden light, the coder sitting at desk with a peaceful smile, golden sunbeam through window, AR glasses reflecting code, gentle ending with credits, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 钢琴独奏渐弱，余韵悠长，最终静默
bgm.instruments: 独奏钢琴、微弱弦乐铺底

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 出租屋内——清晨阳光从窗户洒入，照亮了原本灰暗的小房间

transition.description: 从SEG09结尾的窗户缓慢过渡——进入房间

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 同一个出租屋——但温暖了
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 清晨鸟叫 + 城市远处的声音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A small rental apartment interior bathed in warm golden morning sunlight streaming through the window, the same cluttered coding workspace from the beginning but now transformed by warm light, a figure sitting at the desk with back to camera, gentle warm film grain, soft golden hour lighting, hopeful morning atmosphere, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角慢慢转过头——脸上带着平静而温暖的微笑
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 与开头的空洞表情形成强烈对比——这个微笑值千金
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Side profile of a young man slowly turning his head toward the camera with a gentle warm smile, morning golden sunlight illuminating half his face, peaceful and content expression, a stark contrast to the empty gaze from the beginning, warm tones, soft focus, intimate portrait, hopeful, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 桌上的AR眼镜镜片上反射着屏幕上的代码——但这次代码呈温暖的金色
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: AR眼镜不再是冰冷的道具——它承载着金色的梦
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of AR glasses lying on a desk, their lenses reflecting golden-tinted code from a computer screen, warm morning sunlight catching the glass edges creating small rainbow refractions, the glasses now imbued with warmth instead of cold technology, intimate still life detail, warm golden tones, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角的手放在机械键盘上——指尖轻轻敲击，每个按键好像都在微微发光

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 手指轻放在键盘上，温柔地敲击着

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 与SEG01中疲惫的手形成对比——同样的手，不同的力量
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 机械键盘温暖的敲击声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up overhead shot of gentle hands resting on a mechanical keyboard, fingers softly typing, the keys lit with subtle warm golden backlighting, morning sun casting a warm glow across the keyboard surface, each keypress now deliberate and meaningful, warm intimate detail, golden tones, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 屏幕上的代码——最后一行是注释：// 致每一个不认输的凡人
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 代码即诗——最后一行是献词
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 输入最后一个字符的按键声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a computer screen showing code in warm golden tones on a dark background, the last visible line is a comment reading '// 致每一个不认输的凡人', cursor blinking at the end, warm screen glow, the code as poetry, intimate meaningful moment, soft focus edges, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角戴上AR眼镜——镜片上一瞬间闪过金色的X图案后恢复正常

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 拿起AR眼镜戴上，微微点头

transition.description: 眼镜上一闪而过的金色X——唯一的B世界残余

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 戴上眼镜的瞬间——两个世界在现实中微微重叠
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 眼镜激活的轻微电子音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Front shot of a young man putting on AR glasses with a calm confident smile, for a brief instant a golden X-WOW pattern flashes across the lens then fades, morning light on his face, the only subtle hint of the golden digital world remaining in reality, warm intimate portrait, hopeful, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 镜头缓缓后退——从主角回到整个出租屋的全景，阳光铺满房间
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 回到日常——但日常已不再灰暗
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 键盘声 + 远处城市苏醒的声音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Wide shot pulling back to reveal the full small apartment room bathed in golden morning sunlight, the young man at his desk coding peacefully, warm light filling every corner of the previously dark room, a hopeful ordinary morning, gentle film grain, warm golden hour, the same room transformed by warmth and light, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 继续后退——穿过窗户到外面，看到城市在晨光中苏醒

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: （透过窗户还能看到他的背影在敲代码）

transition.description: 镜头穿过窗户退到室外

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 从个体到城市——千千万万个这样的窗口
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Camera pulling back through a window to the outside, revealing the small apartment from the exterior, the figure visible through the glowing window still typing, surrounded by many other apartment windows in the building, dawn breaking over the city skyline with warm golden light, one window among thousands, universal story, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 城市全景晨光画面——画面渐暗，出现MV字幕：「XWOW × 凡人歌」
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 结束——致每一个不认输的凡人
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 钢琴最后一个音符回响→静默
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Aerial view of a city bathed in golden morning light, the sun rising over the skyline, warm and hopeful, the image slowly dimming, title card text appearing: 'XWOW × 凡人歌', fade to black, ending credits, cinematic finale, golden dawn, 16:9 aspect ratio
